title: Rimuru Tempest's Drago Blade from Tensura
description: This is the Sword from Rimuru Tempest out of the manga and now out of also out of the anime That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime or Tensura
body:
This is the new sword from **Rimuru** that is called **Drago Blade**

anvil name : **Drago Blade**

![Ingame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/326266b2b05d639a7813fb1eacbfce197b583cf6.png)

needs **optifne** for forge or **cit Respawn** for fabric
